nodes.label: P2.2 CIFAR — effective rank / Fisher (rising) / NCC across negative types
nodes.rationale: Fisher ratio (class margin) genuinely RISES through mid-depth for random/oracle/unsup cells (title annotation: 'RISING with depth = the win') before falling past layer 6; but NCC clustering accuracy still declines steadily 0.28->0.17 for all four negative types, showing the margin gain never converts into recoverable class clusters.
